MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2005 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
Edward Singer, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Joseph W.G. Wong
Peter C. Pappas, Esq. on behalf of defendant Chriselda Danao

The parties settled this matter after seeing Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Entry of judgment against Defendant Chriselda Danao in the sum of $7,753.00 to plaintiff Joseph W.G. Wong. Defendant to vacate premises located at 362 - 16th Avenue, #2, S.F., CA. by March 1, 2005. If defendant tenders a cashier's check in the amount of $6,000.00 by 5:00 p.m. this date, the amount owed will be deemed fully satisfied. If defendant vacated by 2/28/05, plaintiff will set aside the judgment, and file dismissal of this action. Plaintiff counsel to prepare judgment.

Judge Robert L. Dondero, Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: Noreen Ikeuye, #3538 (206)
